form.formComment: First look at this trip and drops in distance on last start. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First look at this trip and drops in distance on last start. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.
Checked and collided on first turn fell.
Checked and fell turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Shepparton over 450m. Last start finished last over 425m at Bendigo beaten 5 lengths (24.35) behind In A Bit in a Grade 5 on March 6. Scored two on the trot prior to last start. Can return to winning form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turning into home straight; Checked in back straight.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 525m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (16.98) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Free For All. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 12 starts. Leading player.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by 1.5 lengths in 22.53, beating Mr. Kia Ora. Last start finished 6th on April 6 over 450m at Shepparton behind Bonnie Blitz beaten 6 lengths (25.71) in a Grade 4/5. Holds top-three claims.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Bendigo (24.25) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5 length sixth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.
